dosingInfo.rawDosageText: 2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION During or immediately after cyclophosphamide for injection administration, administer adequate amounts of fluid to reduce the risk of urinary tract toxicity ( 2.1 ). Malignant Diseases: Adult and Pediatric Patients ( 2.2 ) Intravenous: Initial course for patients with no hematologic deficiency: 40 mg per kg to 50 mg per kg in divided doses over 2 to 5 days. Other regimens include 10 mg per kg to 15 mg per kg given every 7 to 10 days or 3 mg per kg to 5 mg per kg twice
